channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead cat on ths Pathway, 4th July
item.description:
I see a dead cat, on my way, leaving work, it's across 'The greyhound' where there's banners of a carribean cuisine next to the place

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Academy Road, Shooters Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Dead animal in the carriageway or footway

item.title: Water leak coming out of the road, 4th July
item.description:
Water leak

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaning Post, 4th July
item.description:
As above and pictured - ED

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping blocking passage, 4th July
item.description:
Rubbish left on passage blocking the way

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ambleside Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th July
item.description:
Fly tipping, bottom end of Camrose Street on the junction with Manton Road. Furniture bits and a massive builders bag

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manton Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Good place for a tree, 4th July
item.description:
The verge is just grass and could do with a tree
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eden Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Gracie's on Hampstead high street, 4th July
item.description:
The tables outside expand so much they take over the pavement so much that by the bin people can't pass comfortably. I can't show it on the photo as there are too many people. On weekends the problem is worse but on weekdays the cafe places their display board beyond the tables blocking the pavement. I don't think permission is to block nearly the entire pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Hampstead High Street, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Packaging left on pavement, 4th July
item.description:
Someone keeps using this spot as their personal skip. Can we get a temp cctv pls?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lakedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping which the local children are now playing with!, 4th July
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped a load of rubbish in the alleyway behind the new builds. This has been here for over a month now and today the local children have started playing with the contents of the rubbish. This contained sharp items like screwdrivers, which I had to confiscate so they don't injure themselves. Please can this be collected as it's now a health and safety hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marshbrook Close, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: End of Queens Crescent (Prince of Wales Side), 4th July
item.description:
Hi, The permit for the compound and welfare unit has expired again (on July 3rd) and the council have not obtained a new permit as required. There have been multiple complaints about this issue previously and the council have not seen fit to deal with the issue in a timely manner, or remove this inconvenience from our area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Crescent, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown rear footpath., 4th July
item.description:
Footpath / rear access not accessible. Totally overgrown and not maintained Now structurally impacting my rear garden and shed ....very large tree like roots and shrubbery. Now attracting rats

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bethel Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden boards and work top (3 total) dumped beside tree outside No31 Cricketfield Rd, 4th July
item.description:
These boards have been dumped here for a couple of days. They have protruding nails/screws. Potential hazard for pedestrians.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricketfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste and plastic bags everywhere on Malvern Road, 4th July
item.description:
No waste being collected.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Gas cannisters on pathway near garages, 4th July
item.description:
Someone has discarded a box containing gas cannisters and other items on the corner of the bend on Fairfield Close. I'm concerned this may end up in the road. The location is just past No.1A near to the garages.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Harman Drive, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste and rubble, 4th July
item.description:
Garden waste and rubble

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prioress Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Confetti littering on Shad Thames, 4th July
item.description:
Wedding party on Shad Thames. Threw litter confetti but didn’t clean it up. Currently blowing into building doorways and all over the street. The wedding party is in all bar one Shad Thames.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Shad Thames, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th July
item.description:
Been here for two years weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Watery Lane, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Knocked down lampost, 4th July
item.description:
A lamppost B3285 in the middle of the road on island ...has been damaged for many months and still not repaired
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 4th July
item.description:
Rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Pigeon been hit, 4th July
item.description:
A bird is on the road after being hit by a car
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Berryhill, Eltham
